blog.title: The Journal
blog.subtitle: Reflections on architecture, the evolution of materiality, and the quiet luxury of the handmade.

posts.title: The Rhythm of the Hand
posts.excerpt: Exploring why the hand-troweled surface remains the industry gold standard for luxury interiors.
content: Microcement is more than a mixture of minerals and polymers; it is a medium for human expression. Unlike poured floors or factory-made tiles, a hand-troweled surface carries the distinctive rhythm of the artisan who applied it.

This biological irregularity is what defines 'Quiet Luxury'. In a world moving toward automated perfection, the subtle variations in trowel pressure and motion create a landscape that is uniquely yours. It is a material that records the process of its own creation.
When we speak of the 'Rhythm of the Hand', we refer to the meditative state our artisans enter during application. It is this focus that ensures the final texture is not just seen, but felt.

posts.title: Exploring Mineral Tonality
posts.excerpt: How natural pigments respond to changing light conditions throughout the day.
content: Color in a mineral surface is never static. Because KUUS DESIGN utilizes raw earthen pigments, the tonality of the surface shifts as natural light moves across the room.
A 'Bone' white might feel warm and inviting at sunset, yet crisp and architectural during the bright afternoon hours. This interaction with the environment is a core pillar of our design philosophy.
We encourage architects to view our surfaces as living canvases. By selecting specific pigment foundations, we can align the atmosphere of a space with the natural rhythms of its geographic location.

posts.title: Bathroom Renovation Without Demolition
posts.excerpt: Discover how microcement allows for a complete aesthetic transformation without the noise and mess of demolition.
content: Traditional bathroom renovations are synonymous with weeks of demolition, dust, and structural disruption. Microcement offers a sophisticated alternative: a continuous mineral skin that can be applied directly over your existing tiles.

This 'Zero Demolition' approach is possible due to the extreme adhesion properties of our specialized mineral formulas. By bypassing the removal process, we significantly reduce waste and project timelines while maintaining a monolithic, spa-like result.

The seamless nature of a microcement bathroom is not just a visual choice; it is a hygienic one. Without grout lines, moisture and mold have nowhere to hide, ensuring your sanctuary remains as pure as the day it was finished.

posts.title: The Definitive Guide: Microcement on Tiles
posts.excerpt: Surface preparation is the foundation of longevity. Learn the professional process of covering old ceramic with microcement.
content: Can you really apply microcement over old tiles? The answer is a definitive yes, provided the substrate is sound. The primary advantage of this technique is the ability to achieve a modern, grout-free look without raising floor levels significantly.

The process begins with diamond-grinding the tile surface to open the pores, followed by a double-layer epoxy primer reinforced with fiberglass mesh. This creates a stable, non-porous foundation that prevents 'ghosting'—the visual telegraphing of old grout lines through the new surface.

At KUUS DESIGN, we utilize specific base-mortars designed to neutralize structural movement. The resulting finish is just 3mm thick yet carries the compressive strength of high-end architectural concrete.

posts.title: Sculptural Silence: Microcement Furniture Trends 2026
posts.excerpt: Furniture is no longer just functional; it is an architectural object. Explore why mineral materiality is the defining trend for 2026.
content: In 2026, the boundary between furniture and architecture continues to blur. Designers are moving away from modular assemblies in favor of monolithic objects that feel as if they were carved from the room's very foundation.

Microcement furniture—cubical coffee tables, cantilevered dining surfaces, and seamless sideboards—serves as the ultimate expression of this 'Monolithic Minimalism'. The material allows for geometric precision while providing the tactile warmth of natural stone.

The trend is shifting toward 'Brutal Elegance'—pairing heavy, mineral forms with soft, organic textiles. A microcement object doesn't just occupy space; it anchors it with a sense of permanence and architectural intent.

products_types.title: Types of Microcement
products_types.sustainability: Sustainability is a key priority for us. You can renovate a space without demolition or change in floor profile using MICROCEMENTO® or BAXAB® because they can be directly applied to your existing floor or wall.
products_types.efficiency: We know that time is a premium, that's why we developed a quick-drying resin system and an innovative installation process. Beautiful surfaces that are usable only 24hs after installation.

story.title: A Legacy of Materiality
story.subtitle: Born from the intersection of raw minerals and sculptural ambition, KUUS DESIGN was founded with a singular purpose: to craft surfaces that define the atmosphere through high-contrast materiality.

origin.title: The Raw Beginning
origin.text: Our journey began in a small industrial studio where we experimented with traditional mineral mixtures. We sought a material that carried the strength of concrete but the tactile elegance of silk. Through years of refinement, our unique microcement formula was born—a material that responds to the hand as much as it does to the architect's vision.

philosophy.title: Handcrafting Silence
philosophy.text: In a world of mass-produced uniformity, we choose the rhythmic motion of the hand-trowel. Each layer of KUUS DESIGN is applied by an artisan, ensuring that no two surfaces are identical. This human touch creates a subtle topographic depth that catches the light and brings a sense of calm, architectural silence to any space.

projects.title: Architectural Portfolio
projects.subtitle: A curation of exclusive spaces where materiality meets vision. High-contrast interiors that define the luxury of tomorrow.

villa.name: Villa Mediterranean
villa.description: Seamless integration of indoor and outdoor microcement terraces for a timeless luxury villa.
villa.longDescription: Set against the rolling hills of Tuscany, this project demanded a material that could bridge the gap between ancient stone architecture and modern minimalist living. We applied over 450sqm of 'Bone' microcement across all living areas and the infinity pool terrace.

boutique.name: Concept Store
boutique.description: Minimalist retail interior utilizing grey-matte microcement pedestals and wall finishes.
boutique.longDescription: The Tokyo project was an exercise in extreme precision. Working within the dense Ginza district, our team created custom sculptural pedestals and a high-traffic grey floor that serves as a neutral canvas for seasonal collections.

spa.name: Aurora Spa
spa.description: Organic, curved microcement forms creating a sanctuary of calm and reflection.
spa.longDescription: In response to the Icelandic landscape, we used 'Charcoal' tones to mirror volcanic basalt. The project features curved steam rooms and monolithic treatment benches, all hand-finished to a seamless mineral texture.

faq.title: Common Inquiries
faq.subtitle: Understanding the technical nuances of mineral application.

items.question: What is the typical thickness of the application?
items.answer: Our microcement system is applied in multiple layers totaling approximately 2-3mm in thickness. Despite its thin profile, it is extremely dense and durable.

items.question: Is microcement suitable for underfloor heating?
items.answer: Yes, microcement is an excellent conductor of heat and its flexible properties make it highly compatible with modern underfloor heating systems.

items.question: How do I maintain the surface?
items.answer: Maintenance is simple. We recommend regular cleaning with a pH-neutral cleaner. Avoid abrasive chemicals to preserve the protective seal.

items.question: Can it be applied over existing tiles?
items.answer: Absolutely. One of the greatest advantages of microcement is its ability to be applied directly over sound substrates like old tiles, avoiding the need for demolition.

business.title: Commercial Partnership
business.subtitle: KUUS DESIGN partners with leading architectural studios and developers to provide bespoke mineral finishes for commercial, retail, and hospitality ventures.

hero.title: The Art of Surfaces
hero.subtitle: Premium architectural microcement. Handcrafted with centuries-old precision and modern aesthetic purity.

philosophy.title: SILENCE IS THE SOUND TIME MAKES.
philosophy.text: We believe that surfaces are not merely backgrounds, but the foundation of atmosphere. Our microcement is handcrafted, layer by layer, creating infinite variations of texture that respond beautifully to natural light. It is raw yet refined, brutal yet elegant.

methodology.title: The Process of Purity
methodology.subtitle: Time is the most valuable ingredient. Each application takes days of deliberate patience and artisan mastery.

steps.title: Surface Preparation
steps.text: The foundation is everything. We meticulously prepare the substrate to ensure perfect adhesion and a long-lasting, stable finish.

steps.title: Hand-Troweled Base
steps.text: Our artisans apply the first layers by hand, establishing the unique topographic character that defines the finished surface.

steps.title: The Mineral Veil
steps.text: The final color and texture layers are applied with rhythmic precision, creating a depth of field that responds to natural light.

steps.title: Impregnation & Seal
steps.text: Advanced protective coatings are applied, making the surface waterproof and durable while preserving the raw, matte aesthetic.

guide_topcret.title: The Topcret Guide
guide_topcret.subtitle: Technical mastery of mineral surfaces.
guide_topcret.description: Microcement is a cutting-edge cementitious coating consisting of fine particles, polymers, and pigments. It offers a seamless finish for floors, walls, and furniture without the need for extensive construction work.

what_is.title: What is microcement?
paragraphs: Microcement, often referred to as micro concrete, micro-screed, or micro-overlay, is a cutting-edge and highly versatile cementitious coating that has been revolutionizing the interior and exterior design industry in the United Kingdom. This innovative material consists of fine particles and can be seamlessly applied to a wide range of surfaces, including floors, walls, and even furniture in both residential and commercial settings.

As a leading microcement supplier in the UK, Topcret proudly brings this exceptional product to the market. What sets microcement apart is its unique combination of qualities, making it a top choice for designers, architects, and homeowners alike. Its durability ensures longevity, making it perfect for high-traffic areas without compromising on aesthetics.

One of the key reasons for microcement’s increasing popularity is its ability to provide a sleek, minimalist, and contemporary look to any space. With an extensive range of colors and finishes, customers have the freedom to unleash their creativity and achieve their desired ambiance. Whether it’s a modern office space, a trendy restaurant, or a chic residential interior, microcement is the ultimate solution to elevate the aesthetic appeal and functionality of any environment.

Not only does microcement offer stunning visual appeal, but its thin application also minimizes the impact on existing structures during renovations or new installations. This feature makes it an ideal choice for those seeking to enhance their space without extensive construction work.
Whether for renovations or new projects, microcement is the ultimate solution to elevate the aesthetic appeal and functionality of any space.

items.title: Microcement Flooring
items.desc: Microcement floors are highly durable and easy to clean, making them a great option for high-traffic areas. They can be customized with a range of finishes, from smooth and polished to textured and rustic, and can be used in a variety of settings, including residential, commercial, and industrial spaces. Microcement flooring is also a cost-effective alternative to traditional flooring materials.

items.title: Microcement Bathrooms
items.desc: Microcement is perfect for creating seamless, waterproof surfaces in your bathroom. Because it is applied in a single layer, there are no grout lines or seams to worry about, which means fewer areas for dirt and mold to accumulate. Microcement bathrooms are easy to clean, durable, and can be customized with a wide range of colors and finishes.

items.title: Microcement Worktops
items.desc: Microcement worktops offer a sleek and durable surface that is perfect for modern kitchen design. With their customizable finishes and seamless application, microcement worktops provide a stylish and practical solution for homeowners looking to upgrade their countertops. Additionally, microcement worktops require minimal maintenance and are highly resistant to stains, making them an ideal choice for busy households.

items.title: Outdoor Microcement
items.desc: Outdoor microcement has revolutionised the way we design and enhance our external spaces. Perfect for patios, terraces, and walkways, this innovative material offers a sleek, seamless finish that's both durable and weather-resistant. Its ability to withstand the elements, combined with its contemporary aesthetic, makes outdoor microcement a preferred choice for homeowners and designers alike. Whether you're aiming to create a chic poolside lounge or a modern garden pathway, outdoor microcement promises a blend of beauty, functionality, and longevity, elevating the appeal of any open-air setting.

items.title: Microcement on walls
items.desc: Microcement is a versatile material that can be used to create a range of wall finishes, from smooth and sleek to textured and rustic. It can also be applied to curved or uneven surfaces, making it an excellent choice for feature walls or accent areas. Microcement walls are highly durable and resistant to cracking, making them a long-lasting and low-maintenance option for any room in your home.

items.title: Microcement Kitchens
items.desc: Microcement surfaces are ideal for creating a modern, clean look in your kitchen. They can be used for countertops, backsplashes, and even flooring, and can be customized to match the design style of your kitchen. Microcement kitchens are highly durable and resistant to stains, making microcement an excellent choice for high-traffic areas like your kitchen.

items.title: Microcement Stairs
items.desc: Microcement can be used to create durable, slip-resistant stair treads and risers. It can be applied to any type of stair, including concrete, wood, or metal, and can be customized to match the design of your space. Microcement stairs are easy to clean and maintain, and are highly resistant to wear and tear.

items.title: Microcement Showers
items.desc: Microcement showers are highly resistant to water damage, making them an ideal choice for bathrooms. Their seamless and continuous surface is not only aesthetically pleasing but also easy to clean and maintain. Microcement showers can be finished in a range of styles, from modern and polished to natural and textured, offering versatility in design.

items.title: Microcement Furniture
items.desc: Microcement can be used to create unique, modern furniture pieces. It can be applied to a wide range of materials, including wood, metal, and plastic, and can be customized to match the design style of your space. Microcement furniture is highly durable and resistant to stains and scratches, making it an excellent choice for high-traffic areas.

items.title: Microcement Pools
items.desc: Microcement pools provide a seamless and waterproof surface that is perfect for pool construction. With their range of customizable finishes and low-maintenance requirements, microcement pools offer a stylish and cost-effective option for homeowners seeking to enhance their outdoor living space.

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.desc: Apply to almost any surface, including curved or uneven ones.

durability.title: Durability
durability.desc: High resistance to daily wear, cracking, stains, and scratches.

customization.title: Customization
customization.desc: Vast range of colors and finishes for a unique look.

waterproof.title: Waterproof
waterproof.desc: Totally waterproof, ideal for showers and swimming pools.

thickness.title: Minimal Thickness
thickness.desc: Thin application that doesn't add weight or height to existing structures.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.desc: Handles minor structural movements without cracking.

eco.title: Eco-friendly
eco.desc: Sustainable production with low VOC emissions.

maintenance.title: Low Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Extremely easy to clean compared to traditional materials.

process_steps.title: Surface Preparation
process_steps.desc: Substrate must be clean, dry, and level. Existing cracks are filled.

process_steps.title: Microcement Mixing
process_steps.desc: Mixed with water and specific pigments for desired consistency.

process_steps.title: Base Layer
process_steps.desc: A thin first layer is applied to the surface and allowed to dry.

process_steps.title: Texture Layer
process_steps.desc: A second layer is applied to achieve the final texture and finish.

process_steps.title: Sealing
process_steps.desc: Sealer application protects against stains and adds final aesthetic effect.

guide_topcret.finishes_intro: The variety of finishes achievable with microcement is influenced by the chosen textures and the specific varnishes or sealants applied. Since microcement is porous, sealants are essential for water resistance and protection.

finishes_list.title: Polished
finishes_list.desc: Perfect for a sleek, contemporary look on walls and floors.

finishes_list.title: Aged & Polished
finishes_list.desc: A chemical treatment before polishing for a rustic, lived-in charm.

finishes_list.desc: Blended with raw pigments to create unique, bespoke color schemes.

finishes_list.title: Glossy

finishes_list.title: Matt
finishes_list.desc: An understated, sophisticated finish perfect for minimalist spaces.

finishes_list.desc: The elegant middle ground. Soft feel, low maintenance, and chic.

finishes_list.title: Non-Slip Matt
finishes_list.desc: Retains the matt aesthetic while providing critical slip-resistance.

custom_interior.subtitle: Mineral artistry beyond the surface. Each decorative element is conceived, drawn, and hand-applied by our studio team.

items.name: Fresco & Lime Wash
items.description: Ancient mineral technique creating organic, breathable wall surfaces with a soft, aged patina unique to each room.

items.name: Geometric Inlays
items.description: Precision-cut mineral patterns — from Moorish latticework to strict modernist grids — embedded directly into the living surface.

items.name: Sculptural Relief Panels
items.description: Three-dimensional decorative panels hand-formed in microcement — for accent walls, headboards, and architectural niches.

items.name: Ombré Mineral Gradients
items.description: Seamless colour transitions from floor to ceiling using raw earthen pigments, with no visible boundary or seam.

items.name: Bespoke Mineral Murals
items.description: Large-scale hand-painted murals in mineral pigment — permanent, UV-stable, and entirely unique to your space.

items.name: Architectural Accents
items.description: Decorative columns, archways, console tables, and fireplace surrounds finished in monolithic microcement.
